google_meet.request_id_rule: Generate a unique requestId for every new conference request; do not reuse one for a different Meet request.
google_meet.async_rule: Conference creation is asynchronous; read back event conferenceData or hangoutLink after mutation.

idempotency.event_id: For create_event, a deterministic event id can prevent duplicate event creation after partial failures.
idempotency.conference_request_id: For Meet generation, conferenceData.createRequest.requestId guards the conference creation request.
